name: seldonframe
description: SeldonFrame Business OS — CRM, Cal.diy booking, Formbricks intake, and Brain v2, all controllable from Claude. Zero config to try: guest mode simulates everything locally. Set SELDONFRAME_API_KEY to persist to app.seldonframe.com.
author: SeldonFrame

SELDONFRAME_API_KEY.description: Optional. Unset = guest mode (local simulator). Set to promote to app.seldonframe.com. Get one at https://app.seldonframe.com/settings/api.

SELDONFRAME_API_BASE.description: Optional override for the Seldon API base URL. Defaults to https://app.seldonframe.com/api/v1.
